goal: Create the next realistic structured-family architecture and implement the safest subset possible.
whatWasImplemented: Added a read-only structured-family model for preserved raw structured records.
Added disabled editor scaffold fields for hl.bind and other structured families.
Added a structured family review workflow for hl.bind candidates that keeps repeated entries read-only.
The review workflow exposes invalid input reasons, raw line preservation requirements, and comments/order preservation requirements.
Added structured edit candidate validation that blocks invalid family prefixes and multiline input.
Added fixture parser/model tests for key binding entries.
Kept active safe-batch structured-family copy blocked.
Identified read-only parser/display work as the safest next subset.
whatWasNotImplemented: No monitor, bind, window rule, workspace rule, device, gesture, permission, animation, or curve writer was enabled.
No real structured config mutation was attempted.

safetyBoundaries.firstSafeEnvWriteCandidate: hl.bind single-line replacement after lossless render proof

blockers: Structured records need lossless parse/edit/render proof before writes.
Each family needs preservation tests for comments, ordering, repeated records, and invalid input rejection.
nextRecommendedWork: Add lossless render tests for one structured family before considering any safe-env write proof.
